# Step 3 — API Skeleton Summary

Date: 2026-02-17

Overview
- Completed Step 3: implemented API skeleton with JWT auth, DB-backed users, task CRUD, and action logging middleware.

Key changes
- Added `User` model and schema: `code/backend/app/models/user.py`
- Hardened security: `code/backend/app/core/security.py` (password hashing, token decode -> 401)
- Implemented DB-backed `/login` and `/me`: `code/backend/app/api/auth.py`
- Standardized auth dependency (`OAuth2PasswordBearer`) in tasks: `code/backend/app/api/tasks.py`
- Fixed `ActionLog` middleware to capture `task_id` and use explicit session: `code/backend/app/middlewares/action_log.py`
- Centralized camelCase Pydantic base model: `code/backend/app/schemas/base.py` and updated schemas
- Wired routers/middleware in `code/backend/app/main.py`
- Added integration tests and test harness: `code/backend/tests/` (server-backed via uvicorn)
- Updated dependency pins to resolve pydantic/pydantic-settings compatibility: `code/backend/requirements.txt`

Tests & Verification
- Ran pytest in the project venv; tests passed (1 test): verifies login, `/me`, tasks create, and ActionLog write.

Notes & Next Steps
- Current password hashing uses `pbkdf2_sha256` for test/dev convenience; consider switching to `bcrypt` in production (requires native `bcrypt`).
- Recommended next actions: commit changes and open PR, scaffold frontend, add more API tests (edge cases), and generate TypeScript client.

Files touched (high level)
- code/backend/app/core/security.py
- code/backend/app/models/*.py (user, task, action_log, manual_report, system_state)
- code/backend/app/api/auth.py
- code/backend/app/api/tasks.py
- code/backend/app/middlewares/action_log.py
- code/backend/app/schemas/base.py
- code/backend/app/main.py
- code/backend/tests/
- code/backend/requirements.txt
